hero.title: Play Hard. Play Ember.
hero.subtitle: Shanghai's premier pickleball venue — book your court in seconds

community.title: Community Centered
community.desc: More than courts — a space designed for connection. Relax, work, and play in an environment built to bring people together.

payment.title: International Payments
payment.desc: Seamless booking for everyone. We support major international and local payment methods so you can focus on playing.

facilities.title: Fully Equipped
facilities.desc: Everything you need for a great experience, from arrival to departure. Come as you are — we've got you covered.

booking.title: Book a Court
booking.name: Your Name
booking.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number (7-20 digits, may include +, spaces, hyphens, parentheses)

testMode.paymentBanner: Test Mode: No real payment will be charged

info.title: Court Information
info.peakTime: Mon–Fri 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM, Sat–Sun 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM
info.policyCancel: All sales are final — no cancellation upon booking
info.policyArrive: Keep the environment clean on and off court. Be considerate of others for a sustainable experience.

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your bookings
login.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: Set your nickname to start booking courts
onboarding.hint: After completing your profile, you'll be able to book courts
onboarding.errorLoadProfile: Failed to load profile. Please refresh the page or try again later.
onboarding.errorSaveProfile: Failed to save. Please try again.
onboarding.errorNicknameLength: Nickname must be at least 2 characters

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: Please refresh the page to try again.

footer.description: Shanghai's premier pickleball venue. Professional courts, flexible booking, unforgettable games.
footer.address: Building 3, No. 2121 Sanlu Road, Minhang District, Shanghai
footer.copyright: © year Ember Sports. All rights reserved.

notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

about.storyP1: We are a team with an international outlook, united by a shared passion for sports and community. Our journey began with a simple belief: that sports venues should be more than just courts — they should be vibrant spaces where people connect, grow, and thrive together.
about.storyP2: Our vision is to build a community-oriented sports ecosystem, empowered by artificial intelligence, that makes premium sports experiences accessible and enjoyable for everyone. We bring warmth, dedication, and innovation to every aspect of what we do.
about.valueCommunityDesc: Building spaces where friendships form and communities flourish through the love of sport.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Leveraging technology to create smarter, more seamless experiences for players and venues.
about.valueInclusiveDesc: Welcoming players from all backgrounds with open arms and international sensibility.
about.shanghaiDesc: Founded in Singapore, our first venue calls Shanghai home — a city that embodies the perfect blend of tradition and innovation, East and West. The ideal launchpad for our global vision.
about.shanghaiAddress: Building 3, No. 2121 Sanlu Road, Minhang District, Shanghai (Pujiang Town, Block 501, Lot 5/2)
